common.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-30 characters: letters, digits, -, _
common.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
common.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters

hero.title: Track Your Emotional & Physical Well-Being
hero.subtitle: MindJournal helps you understand patterns in your mood, sleep, and activity through data visualization and AI-powered insights.

features.title: Everything You Need to Track Your Well-being

daily.title: Daily Tracking
daily.description: Log your mood, sleep, activity, stress, energy, and focus in seconds.

dashboard.title: Visual Dashboard
dashboard.description: See your progress at a glance with beautiful charts and color-coded metrics.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.description: Discover correlations between different metrics and understand what affects your well-being.

recommendations.title: Personalized Tips
recommendations.description: Get AI-powered recommendations based on your unique patterns and trends.

calendar.title: Calendar View
calendar.description: Browse your history with an intuitive calendar and see your daily records.

insights.title: Deep Insights
insights.description: Understand how different factors influence your well-being over time.

step1.title: Track Metrics
step1.description: Daily log your mood, sleep, activity and other indicators

step3.title: Get Insights
step3.description: Smart recommendations based on your data

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email
confirmEmail.success: Your email has been confirmed successfully. You can now sign in.
confirmEmail.failed: Failed to confirm email. The link may have expired.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.success: A reset code has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.codeTitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your email

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.success: Password has been reset. You can now sign in.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your well-being today

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: View and manage your records
calendar.futureDate: Cannot add record for a future date

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Analyze correlations and identify patterns
analytics.goToRecommendationsDesc: Based on analysis of your data

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Personal advice based on analysis of your data
recommendations.notEnoughDataDesc: More records are needed to generate personalized recommendations. Keep logging your daily well-being and the system will start providing recommendations.
recommendations.tipDesc: Recommendations are automatically updated based on your latest data. The more records you add, the more accurate the recommendations will be.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and security
profile.emailSameAsCurrent: New email cannot be the same as current email
profile.clearDataMessage: All your wellness records will be deleted. Your account will remain, but analytics and recommendations will be reset.
profile.deleteAccountMessage: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
profile.emailNotConfirmed: Your email is not confirmed. Please check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
profile.resendSuccess: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox.
